text: <par>This Pekon tone indicates a formerly checked syllable with voiceless initial, so not such a good fit for this etymon.</par>

<par>Kayan <latinform>myə̤̀ɨ</latinform> most likely 'forest', not 'grass', as the author recognizes it in <latinform>tʰwî myà̤</latinform> 'wild dog' and <latinform>sʰə́ɨ myə̤̀ɨ</latinform> 'wild chicken'.</par>
